items.title: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says
items.dek: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.
items.body: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US Supreme Court upholds bans on transgender women in female school and college sports
items.dek: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.
items.body: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.
items.author: IriLine Desk
